insight: VIP sits at the highest average selling price (Rs 3,948), making it the clearest premium-positioned brand.
Safari leads on sentiment while maintaining a solid 4.07 star average, suggesting customers broadly feel the product promise matches reality.
Safari delivers the strongest value-for-money score, balancing sentiment, star rating, and price better than peers.
Safari relies most on discounting with an average markdown of 78.3%, which may be boosting appeal but can signal weaker full-price pricing power.
American Tourister shows the highest share of durability-related negative reviews, making after-sales trust a likely pressure point.
Skybags has the most high-star but text-negative reviews, which often indicates customers like the look or price but still mention operational issues.
